src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handleUpdateSettings = async (updates: Partial<CompanySettings>) => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    if (!companySettings) return;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setSaving('settings');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    try {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      const res = await apiFetch('/api/company/settings', {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        method: 'PUT',

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      });
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to update settings');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      setCompanySettings({ ...companySettings, ...updates });
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Erreur lors de la sauvegarde');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      setSaving(null);
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handleSimulate = () => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const getRule = (code: string) => rules.find(r => r.code === code);
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    // 1. Base for IS and CN (80% of Gross)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const base80 = simGross * 0.8;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    // 2. CNPS (Part Salariale)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const cnpsRule = getRule('CNPS_RET_SAL');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const cnpsBase = cnpsRule?.ceiling ? Math.min(simGross, cnpsRule.ceiling) : simGross;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const cnpsEmployee = Math.round(cnpsBase * (cnpsRule?.rate || 0.063));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    // 3. IS (Impôt sur le Salaire)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const isRule = getRule('IS');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const isTax = Math.round(base80 * (isRule?.rate || 0.012));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    // 4. CN (Contribution Nationale)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    let cnTax = 0;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const cnBrackets = brackets.filter(b => b.tax_code === 'CN');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    if (cnBrackets.length > 0) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      const bracket = cnBrackets.find(b => base80 >= b.min_value && (!b.max_value || base80 < b.max_value));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      if (bracket) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        cnTax = Math.round(base80 * bracket.rate - bracket.deduction);
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    } else {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      // Fallback to legacy calculation
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      if (base80 > 50000) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        if (base80 <= 130000) cnTax = (base80 - 50000) * 0.015;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        else if (base80 <= 200000) cnTax = (130000 - 50000) * 0.015 + (base80 - 130000) * 0.05;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        else cnTax = (130000 - 50000) * 0.015 + (200000 - 130000) * 0.05 + (base80 - 200000) * 0.10;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    cnTax = Math.round(cnTax);
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    // 5. IGR (Impôt Général sur le Revenu)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const igrBase = Math.max(0, (base80 - isTax - cnTax - cnpsEmployee) * 0.85);
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const q = igrBase / simParts;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    let igrTax = 0;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    const igrBrackets = brackets.filter(b => b.tax_code === 'IGR');
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    if (igrBrackets.length > 0) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      const bracket = igrBrackets.find(b => q >= b.min_value && (!b.max_value || q < b.max_value));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      if (bracket) {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        igrTax = Math.max(0, Math.round(igrBase * bracket.rate - bracket.deduction * simParts));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    } else {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      // Fallback
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      let igrRate = 0, v = 0;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      if (q <= 25000) { igrRate = 0; v = 0; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 45500) { igrRate = 0.10; v = 2500; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 81500) { igrRate = 0.15; v = 4775; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 126500) { igrRate = 0.20; v = 8850; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 220000) { igrRate = 0.25; v = 15175; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 389000) { igrRate = 0.35; v = 37175; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else if (q <= 842000) { igrRate = 0.45; v = 76075; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      else { igrRate = 0.60; v = 202375; }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      igrTax = Math.max(0, Math.round(igrBase * igrRate - v * simParts));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    }
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setSimResult({
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      cnpsEmployee,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      isTax,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      cnTax,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      igrTax,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      totalTaxes: isTax + cnTax + igrTax,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      net: simGross - cnpsEmployee - isTax - cnTax - igrTax
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    });
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handleBracketChange = (id: number, field: keyof TaxBracket, value: any) => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setBrackets(prev => prev.map(b => b.id === id ? { ...b, [field]: value } : b));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handleReductionChange = (id: number, field: keyof TaxReduction, value: any) => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setReductions(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, [field]: value } : r));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handlePayrollRuleChange = (id: number, field: keyof PayrollRule, value: any) => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setPayrollRules(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, [field]: value } : r));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const handleChange = (code: string, field: keyof TaxRule, value: any) => {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    setRules(prev => prev.map(r => r.code === code ? { ...r, [field]: value } : r));
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:  const renderRuleRow = (rule: TaxRule) => (
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:    <tr key={rule.code} className="hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors">
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      <td className="px-6 py-4">
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        <div className="font-medium text-slate-900 dark:text-slate-100">{rule.name}</div>

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      </td>

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          <input

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            value={rule.rate ? (rule.rate * 100).toFixed(3) : ''}
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            onChange={(e) => handleChange(rule.code, 'rate', parseFloat(e.target.value) / 100)}
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            placeholder="-"
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            className="w-20 px-2 py-1 text-right border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-md text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-green/20 focus:border-brand-green bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-white transition-colors"
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          />

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        </div>
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      </td>
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:      <td className="px-6 py-4">
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          <input

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            value={rule.ceiling || ''}
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            onChange={(e) => handleChange(rule.code, 'ceiling', e.target.value ? parseFloat(e.target.value) : null)}
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            placeholder="Illimité"
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            className="w-28 px-2 py-1 text-right border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 rounded-md text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-green/20 focus:border-brand-green bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-white transition-colors"
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          />

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        <button

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          className={cn(
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            "p-1 rounded-full transition-colors",
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:            rule.is_active ? "text-brand-green hover:bg-brand-green/10 dark:hover:bg-brand-green/20" : "text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800"
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:          )}
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:        >

src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:               if (!newRuleCode) return;
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:               const newRule = {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 code: newRuleCode.toUpperCase(),
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 name: 'Nouvelle Règle',
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 type: 'bonus',
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 formula: '0',
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 is_taxable: 1,
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 is_social_taxable: 1
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:               };
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:               try {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 const res = await apiFetch('/api/pr/rules', {
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                   method: 'POST',
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                   headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                   body: JSON.stringify(newRule)
src/components/PayrollSettingsManager.tsx:                 });

src/components/TaxSettingsManager.tsx:        const cnpsSalRule = rules.find((r: any) => r.code === 'CNPS_RET_SAL');
src/components/TaxSettingsManager.tsx:        const cnpsPatRule = rules.find((r: any) => r.code === 'CNPS_RET_PAT');

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:interface TrialBalanceEntry {

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [companySettings, setCompanySettings] = useState<CompanySettings | null>(null);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('');
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const [filter, setFilter] = useState('');
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const setQuickRange = (range: 'month' | 'quarter' | 'year' | 'all') => {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    if (range === 'all') {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      setStartDate('');
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      setEndDate('');
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      return;
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    }
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    const now = new Date();
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    let start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    let end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + 1, 0);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    if (range === 'quarter') {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      const quarter = Math.floor(now.getMonth() / 3);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), quarter * 3, 1);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), (quarter + 1) * 3, 0);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    } else if (range === 'year') {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), 0, 1);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), 11, 31);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    }
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    setStartDate(start.toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    setEndDate(end.toISOString().split('T')[0]);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  };
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    fetchData();
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    fetchCompanySettings();
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  }, [startDate, endDate, activeYear?.id]);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const fetchCompanySettings = async () => {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    try {

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      const data = await res.json();

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    }

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const fetchData = async () => {

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    try {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      const params = new URLSearchParams();
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      if (startDate) params.append('startDate', startDate);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      if (endDate) params.append('endDate', endDate);

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      console.error(err);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:    }

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const filteredData = data.filter(item =>

src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  );
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const totalDebit = filteredData.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.debit, 0);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const totalCredit = filteredData.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.credit, 0);
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const isBalanced = Math.abs(totalDebit - totalCredit) < 1;
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:
src/components/TrialBalance.tsx:  const handleExportCSV = () => {

src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:interface MarketRate {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  from: string;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  to: string;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  rate: number;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  source: string;

src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:interface AnalysisResult {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  currency: string;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  systemRate: number;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  marketRate: number;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  difference: number;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  status: 'up-to-date' | 'outdated' | 'missing';
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:}
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:export function CurrencyAnalyzer() {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const { currency: baseCurrency, exchangeRates } = useCurrency();
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const [analyzing, setAnalyzing] = useState(false);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const [results, setResults] = useState<AnalysisResult[]>([]);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const [updating, setUpdating] = useState(false);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const [lastAnalysis, setLastAnalysis] = useState<Date | null>(null);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const currenciesToAnalyze = ['USD', 'EUR', 'GBP', 'GNF', 'CDF', 'XOF', 'XAF'];
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const analyzeCurrencies = async () => {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    setAnalyzing(true);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    try {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      // Filter out base currency from analysis
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const targets = currenciesToAnalyze.filter(c => c !== baseCurrency);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const prompt = `Provide the current exchange rates for the following currencies relative to ${baseCurrency}: ${targets.join(', ')}. 
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      Return the data as a JSON array of objects with "from", "to", and "rate" (number) properties. 
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      Example: [{"from": "USD", "to": "${baseCurrency}", "rate": 605.50}].
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      Only return the JSON array, no other text.`;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const response = await apiFetch('/api/gemini/generate', {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        method: 'POST',
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          model: "gemini-3.5-flash",
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          contents: prompt,
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          config: {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:            tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }],
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:            responseMimeType: "application/json"
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          }
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        })
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      });
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to analyze currencies');
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const data = await response.json();
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const marketRates: MarketRate[] = parseSafeJSON(data.text || "[]");
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      const analysisResults: AnalysisResult[] = marketRates.map(mr => {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        const systemRate = exchangeRates.find(r => r.from_currency === mr.from && r.to_currency === mr.to)?.rate || 0;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        const diff = systemRate > 0 ? ((mr.rate - systemRate) / systemRate) * 100 : 0;
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        return {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          currency: mr.from,
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          systemRate,
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          marketRate: mr.rate,
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          difference: diff,
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          status: systemRate === 0 ? 'missing' : Math.abs(diff) < 0.5 ? 'up-to-date' : 'outdated'
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        };
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      });
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      setResults(analysisResults);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      setLastAnalysis(new Date());
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      console.error("Analysis failed", err);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      setAnalyzing(false);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    }
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  };
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  const updateAllRates = async () => {

src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    try {

src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:          })
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        });
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      }
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      // Refresh the page or trigger a reload of rates
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      window.location.reload();
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    } catch (err) {

src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      setUpdating(false);
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    }
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  };
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:  return (
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:    <div className="premium-card overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-300 mt-6">
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:      <div className="p-8 border-b border-slate-100 dark:border-slate-800 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-6 bg-slate-50/50 dark:bg-slate-900/50">
src/components/CurrencyAnalyzer.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">

src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                reader.onloadend = () => {
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                  const img = new Image();
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                  img.onload = () => {
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    const MAX_DIM = 512;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    let { width, height } = img;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    if (width > height && width > MAX_DIM) {
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      height *= MAX_DIM / width;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      width = MAX_DIM;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    } else if (height > MAX_DIM) {
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      width *= MAX_DIM / height;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      height = MAX_DIM;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    }
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    canvas.width = width;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    canvas.height = height;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    if (ctx) {
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL(file.type === 'image/png' ? 'image/png' : 'image/jpeg', 0.85);
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                      updateFormData({ logoUrl: dataUrl });
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                    }
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                  };
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                  img.src = reader.result as string;
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                };
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                              }
src/components/CompanyCreation.tsx:                            }}

src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:  const handleMatchInvoice = async (receipt: GoodsReceipt) => {

src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:      const newMatching = {

src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:        vat_po: po.amount * 0.18,
src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:        discrepancies: discrepancies,
src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:        anomalies: amountInvoice > 2000000 ? ["Montant exceptionnel nécessitant validation DG."] : [],
src/components/ProcureToPay.tsx:        status: (discrepancies.length > 0 || amountInvoice > 2000000) ? 'discrepancy' : 'matched',

src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ total: 0, accuracy: 0, uemoa: 0, cemac: 0 });
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    fetchFeedbacks();
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  const fetchFeedbacks = async () => {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    try {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const q = query(collection(db, 'ocr_feedback'), orderBy('timestamp', 'desc'), limit(50));
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const data = querySnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as OCRFeedback));
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      setFeedbacks(data);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      // Basic stats calculation
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const total = data.length;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const uemoa = data.filter(f => f.region === 'UEMOA').length;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      const cemac = data.filter(f => f.region === 'CEMAC').length;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      setStats({ total, accuracy: 85, uemoa, cemac }); // Accuracy is placeholder for now
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      console.error("Error fetching OCR feedback:", error);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    }
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  };
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  const calculateDiffCount = (ai: any, user: any) => {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    let diffs = 0;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    const keys = ['amount_ht', 'amount_ttc', 'date', 'third_party', 'invoice_number', 'third_party_id', 'currency'];
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    keys.forEach(k => {
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:      if (ai[k] !== user[k]) diffs++;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    });
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:    return diffs;
src/components/AiTrainingDashboard.tsx:  };
